creator: freebsd@epostillion.de
text:
I'am using 2 Intel Server 2150G :
440GX+ Chipset

Dual Pentium III 850 Mhz
1 G Memory ECC
Mylex Accelleraid 352
4 Seagate 18G as Raid 0+1

Dual Pentium III 1000 Mhz
2 G Memory ECC
Mylex Accelleraid 352
4 IBM 36G as Raid 0+1

both Server have the newest Main-Board Bios and Firmware for the Mylex

You can not reboot the system with the command reboot...
the system hangs after showing the sync of the disc an the uptime
even ctrl alt del is not working.
You just have to reset the system or cycle the power

How-To-Repeat: shutdown - p now will show the same symptoms.
Even sysinstall  can not reboot the system.
Both system are working in the same configuration with an
ami megaraid 438.

With the Mylex controller i never managed it to reboot the system in any way.
